homepage.title: Vondra a Vondra
homepage.text_excerpt:
Vondra a Vondra
Přeskočit na obsah
Vondra a Vondra
Firma Vondra a Vondra je rodinný podnik s bohatou historií, která sahá až do roku 1990, kdy byla založena Ladislavem Vondrou pod názvem V & V . Tento rok se stal počátkem příběhu, který se vyznačuje inovací, tradicí a rodinnými hodnotami. Již o několik let později , se k podnikání postupně připojili i oba synové, kteří vnesli do firmy novou energii a ambici rozvíjet ji dále.

about.text:
About company – Vondra a Vondra
Skip to content
Few words about our company
Vondra a Vondra company is a family business with a rich history that goes back to 1990 when it was founded by Ladislav Vondra under the name V & V. This year marked the beginning of a story characterized by innovation, tradition and family values. A few years later, two sons gradually joined the business and brought new energy and ambition for the further development.
The year 2002 brought an important milestone in the company’s development. At the beginning of the year it came to the first major expansion of the production premises with a new building on an area of approx. 400m2 and then in April of the same year the company changed to a legal form s. r. o. (Ltd.), which enabled more efficient management and growth. These decisions have shown as the key ones, because a few years later, in 2009-10, there was another considerable expansion of the company, which enabled to significantly increase its capacities and extend the product range.
From the very beginning, the team of V&V, subsequently Vondra and Vondra s.r.o., specializes in the production of vibration feeders, which are the beginning of all the automation. This specialization is a key part of their identity and they are professional in this field. But what really sets the company apart from competition, is their approach to production. Vondra and Vondra s.r.o. makes all products from the very beginning till the end, which means that it is not only a subcontractor, but it completely controls every step of the production process. This approach ensures the high product quality and reliability, which is appreciated by the customers.
During its existence, V&V, subsequently Vondra and Vondra s.r.o. has built a strong position in the market thanks to an uncompromising emphasis on quality, innovation and customer satisfaction. Their story is an example of how family values ​​and long-term vision can lead to success and growth in competitive environment.
